TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tom_Boerwinkle, title = Tom_Boerwinkle, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tom_Boerwinkle} }

S.FORM: Tom Boerwinkle sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1945 , ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 8, Tom Boerwinkle, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Tom Boerwinkle sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1945 , ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 8, Tom Boerwinkle, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tom βoerwinkle s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tom βoerwinkle, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
